title: Humanity's Last Exam
summary: A benchmark of 2,500 expert-level academic questions across all domains to assess AI capabilities at the frontier of human knowledge.

title: HLE-Verified: A Systematic Verification and Structured Revision
summary: Verified version of HLE with 641 verified + 1,170 revised = 1,811 questions, improving answer reliability.

title: FeatureBench: Benchmarking Agentic Coding for Complex Feature Development
summary: 200 tasks across 24 Python repos testing complex feature development. SOTA GPT-5.1-Codex: 12.5%.

title: s1: Simple Test-Time Scaling
summary: 1,000 examples matching o1-preview performance, supporting test-time compute scaling route.

title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning in LLMs through RL
summary: RL-based reasoning model achieving strong performance across math, coding, and reasoning benchmarks.

title: Does RL Really Incentivize Reasoning Beyond the Base Model?
summary: PROVOCATIVE: RL merely releases rather than creates reasoning capabilities. Questions the fundamental assumption of RL-for-reasoning.

title: The Illusion of Thinking
summary: PROVOCATIVE: Reasoning models completely collapse on high-complexity tasks, suggesting fundamental limitations.

title: Reasoning Models Don't Always Say What They Think
summary: PROVOCATIVE: Chain-of-thought is unfaithful to actual model reasoning, undermining safety monitoring.
